note.text: Ring-estimated BP. The Colmi R12 has no BP cuff; values are derived from PPG pulse-wave analysis and should be treated as lifestyle-grade, not clinical.

code.text: Ring blood-sugar estimate (NOT a glucose measurement)

note.text: The Colmi R12 has no electrochemical glucose sensor. This value is an algorithmic estimate without clinical validation. Not interchangeable with a true glucose reading.
